# hetzner_ssh_key (Resource)

Manages an SSH public key stored in the Hetzner Robot account.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "hetzner_ssh_key" "example" {
  name = "my-key"
  data = "ssh-ed25519 AAAAC3NzaC1lZDI1NTE5AAAA..."
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `data` (String) Public key in OpenSSH format. Immutable after creation.
- `name` (String) Name of the SSH key.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation date of the SSH key.
- `fingerprint` (String) Fingerprint of the SSH key. Used as the unique identifier.
- `size` (Number) Key size in bits.
- `type` (String) Algorithm type: RSA, ECDSA, or ED25519.
